revision.comment: explain where to look for more external links templates
revision.text: * id: A [[unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead.

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead.

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead. revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead. [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead. [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_Style_documentation%2Fid1 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: * id: A [[:en:Unique identifier|Unique identifier]], used where none of the specialized identifiers are applicable; wikilink or use an [[:Category:External link templates|external link template]] as applicable. For example, {{para|id|NCJ 122967}} will append "NCJ 122967" at the end of the citation. You can use templates such as {{para|id|{{NCJ|122967}}}} to append {{NCJ|122967}} instead.
